metadata.name: Create Highlight Clips from a Live Stream

description: During a live gaming stream, a community manager needs to create highlight clips of exciting moments to share on social media.

nodes.task_description: Identify a key moment in the live stream (e.g., a game-winning play).

expected_outcome.value: Agent notes the timestamp of the highlight.

nodes.task_description: Use a clipping tool to create a 30-second video clip of the moment from the live feed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the video clip.

nodes.task_description: Post the video clip to the company's Twitter and TikTok accounts with a relevant caption.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully shares the highlight on social media.
